prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 2220→2436→1692→6633→2583，2024 年出现异常大幅后移（6633 名），2025 年迅速恢复至 2583 名；近 3 年（2023–2025）波动较大，但 2025 年已回归正常区间，基准约 2583 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2024 年均为 14 人，2025 年增至 15 人；2026 年计划 14 人，较 2025 年缩招 1 人（约 6.7%），竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 65 位持续上升至 2026 年第 57 位，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所增加；2025 年声誉评价偏负面（教授考核争议），2026 年高考周期内无重大声誉事件；抖音热度总排名第 73 位（评价一般），短视频平台曝光度中等；历史无投档断档记录，录取走势相对平稳；法学 A、应用经济学 A-，与物理类招生专业（法学类、财政学类、会计学、计算机类等）部分匹配，法学对物理类考生也有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度近年从高热推荐转为推 荐，电子信息/通信高热推荐，理工科专业整体热度较高；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 4.8 万，按历史比例估算物理类约 3.07 万人，较 2025 年（3.05 万）略有增加。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2583 名、2026 年小幅缩招 6.7% 使竞争略加剧、学校排名持续上升增强吸引力、物理类考生增加等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年略有前移（更难进）；预测最低位次约 2465 名，区间 1965–2965 名。

一档（最难进）

- 会计学（会计学、注册会计师、财管）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（数据科学与大数据技术、计算机科学与技术、信息安全、人工智能）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category (including Science) minimum rankings approximately 2220→2436→1692→6633→2583, with an abnormal large backward shift in 2024 (6633rd), quickly recovering to 2583rd in 2025; fluctuations are large in recent 3 years (2023–2025), but 2025 has returned to normal range, baseline about 2583rd; provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 14 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 15 in 2025; 2026 plan is 14, a reduction of 1 (about 6.7%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting steady improvement in comprehensive strength, increasing attractiveness to examinees; 2025 reputation evaluation slightly negative (professor assessment controversy), no major reputation events during 2026 college entrance examination cycle; Douyin heat total ranking 73rd (average evaluation), moderate exposure on short video platforms; no history of admission gaps, relatively stable admission trend; Law A, Applied Economics A-, partially matching Physics Category enrollment majors (Law, Finance, Accounting, Computer Science, etc.), Law also has some appeal to Physics Category examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science popularity has shifted from high-heat recommendation to recommendation in recent years, Electronics/Information/Communication high-heat recommendation, overall high popularity of science and engineering majors; provincial 2026 general college entrance examination total number about 48,000, estimated Physics Category about 30,700 based on historical proportion, slightly increased from 2025 (30,500).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2583rd, a slight 6.7% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, continuously rising university rankings enhancing attractiveness, and an increase in Physics Category examinees, it is expected that the 2026 minimum admission ranking will slightly move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking about 2465th, range 1965–2965th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (including Law, Civil and Commercial Law, Foreign-related Rule of Law, etc.)
- Accounting (Accounting, Certified Public Accountant, Financial Management)
- Finance (Finance, Taxation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Economics and Finance, Economics)
- Finance (Finance, Investment)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Applied Statistics Dual Bachelor's Degree)
- Economics
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range of 1965–2965, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2100), focus on sprinting for top majors like Law and Accounting; if ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., after 2800), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety and strive to enter the university.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 662→552→1737→532→691. In 2023, there was an abnormal large backward shift (1737th place), but it quickly recovered to 532nd place in 2024, and slightly shifted back to 691st place in 2025. In the recent three years (2023–2025), fluctuations were significant, but the trend stabilized in 2024–2025, with a baseline of approximately 691st place in 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 11 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 12 students in 2024–2025, and is planned to be 14 students in 2026, an increase of 2 students (about 16.7%) compared to 2025. This relatively large expansion alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2025, reputation evaluation was slightly negative (professor assessment controversy), but no major reputation events occurred during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle. Douyin popularity ranks 73rd overall (average evaluation), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. There is no history of enrollment gaps, and admission trends are relatively stable. Law is rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation), and Applied Economics is rated A-, both core disciplines in finance, economics, and law, highly matching the university's enrollment majors and strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law popularity has shifted from high heat recommendation to differentiated observation, while finance and economics major popularity is also differentiated. Overall application enthusiasm tends to be rational. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in the province is about 48,000, with an estimated 17,300 in the History Category based on historical proportions, roughly the same as 2025 (17,200).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 691st place, the significant 16.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the continuous rise in university rankings enhancing attractiveness, and the strong appeal of advantageous disciplines like Law (A) and Applied Economics (A-) to liberal arts candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 770th place, with a range of 531–1009.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law (including Law, Civil and Commercial Law, Foreign-related Rule of Law, etc.)
- Accounting (Accounting, Certified Public Accountant, Financial Management)
- Finance and Taxation (Finance, Taxation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Finance (Finance, Investment)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Economics and Finance, Economics)
- Administrative Management (Digital Governance Excellence Talent Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration (Administrative Management, Labor and Social Security, Urban Management)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Translation, Business English)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 531–1009, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 600), you can aim for top majors like Law or Accounting. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., after 900), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety options to secure admission to this university.
